policies.name: custom_policy_CA_08
policies.description: 각 서비스에서 내부 네트워크만 사용하는 리소스에 공용 IP주소를 제거하고, 서비스 역할에 맞게 권한을 부여하여 외부 접근 시도를 차단하기 위함
policies.source: 주요정보통신기반시설 기술적 취약점 분석·평가 방법 상세가이드 CA-0708.pdf
policies.yaml:
---
metadata:
  id: CKV2_CUSTOM_CA_08
  name: custom_policy_CA_08
  category: NETWORKING
  severity: HIGH
scope:
  provider: aws
definition:
  resource_types:
    - aws_db_instance
  prevent:
    - public_exposure:
        - 'true'

policies.name: custom_policy_CA_07
policies.description: Public/Private 서브넷을 각 가상 네트워크 리소스를 단위로 분리하여 안전하게 운영하기 위함
policies.source: 주요정보통신기반시설 기술적 취약점 분석·평가 방법 상세가이드 CA-0708.pdf
policies.yaml:
---
metadata:
  id: CKV2_CUSTOM_CA_07
  name: custom_policy_CA_07
  category: GENERAL_SECURITY
  severity: MEDIUM
scope:
  provider: aws
definition:
  resource_types:
    - aws_route_table
    - aws_route_table_association
    - aws_internet_gateway
    - aws_nat_gateway
    - aws_subnet
  prevent:
    - or:
      - or:
        - 'not:
            and:
              - left: routing_topology.route_table_association.route_table.routes
                op: exists
              - left: routing_topology.route_table_association.route_table.routes[*].gateway_id
                op: exists
              - right: aws_internet_gateway.id
                op: eq
        - 'not:
            and:
              - left: routing_topology.route_table_association.route_table.routes
                op: exists
              - left: routing_topology.route_table_association.route_table.routes[*].gateway_id
                op: exists
              - right: aws_nat_gateway.id
                op: eq
      - 'not:
          and:
            - left: routing_topology.route_table_association.route_table.routes
              op: exists
            - left: routing_topology.route_table_association.route_table.routes[*].gateway_id
              op: exists
            - right: aws_internet_gateway.id
              op: eq
            - left: routing_topology.route_table_association.route_table.routes[*].destination_cidr_block
              op: eq
              value: 0.0.0.0/0
      - 'not:
          and:
            - left: routing_topology.route_table_association.route_table.routes
              op: exists
            - left: routing_topology.route_table_association.route_table.routes[*].gateway_id
              op: exists
            - right: aws_nat_gateway.id
              op: eq
            - left: routing_topology.route_table_association.route_table.routes[*].destination_cidr_block
              op: eq
              value: 0.0.0.0/0
